7. if obstacle_ahead: rotate_spot(90) else: rotate_spot(-90) # Check if an obstacle is ahead; if so, turn -90 degrees to face -x direction, otherwise turn -90 degrees to face -y direction.
8. move_spot(2.0)   # Move forward 2 meters.
9. finish_task      # Check if at_goal.

fail: Unbounded loop; Long search pattern
